steps: 01. To get started, join as a Samsung Account member.
02. Next, read and accept the Terms and Conditions.
03. Check your points and benefits on My Rewards page.

samsung_rewards_program.section_title: How to earn points on Samsung Online Store
steps: 01. Log in to your Samsung Account.
02. Automatically receive points for every purchase on Samsung.com/sg and Samsung Shop App.
01. At checkout, select Samsung Rewards as a payment method (log-in required).
02. Choose how many points to use and submit. The discount will be applied upon payment.
additional_notes: You can redeem up to 99% of the purchase price using points.
Any pending Rewards Points will appear in your account 14 days after your order is completed.

steps: 01. Ensure you have available Global Rewards Points.
02. Convert your Global Rewards Points into MY points and use them for your purchases.
additional_notes: Rewards points transfers are available between Samsung Rewards Points programs of participating entities.
Availability of the Global Rewards Points transfer may vary depending on country or region.
Point conversions are limited to 10 times per day and 30 times per month (based on UTC time).
